name: financial_services_port_security_southport_lib_eq
premise: A retail bank’s outage recovery playbook conflicts with a regulator’s informal guidance on customer communication timing. In Financial Services, the situation tagged internally around financial services port security southport lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Port corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A wire, settlement, or registry window closes before the next business day begins in the primary jurisdiction. The trade is not abstract: it is liberty versus equality under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Arjun Sato
agents.identity: I am Arjun Sato, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Financial Services. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Priya Kim
agents.identity: I am Priya Kim, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Financial Services. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if liberty advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for equality.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Arjun Sato must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Arjun Sato do?
